parameters.subject: =Appointment Confirmed - {{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.config.BUSINESS_NAME}}
parameters.message:
=

✅ Appointment Confirmed!

Hi {{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.booking.name}},

Great news! Your appointment has been confirmed. Here are the details:

📅 Date: {{$node['Parse Date & Time'].json.appointment.dateFormatted}}
🕐 Time: {{$node['Parse Date & Time'].json.appointment.timeFormatted}}
💼 Service: {{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.booking.service}}
⏱️ Duration: {{$node['Parse Date & Time'].json.appointment.duration}} minutes

What happens next?

  • You'll receive a reminder 24 hours before your appointment
  • This appointment has been added to your calendar
  • If you need to reschedule, please contact us as soon as possible

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out:

📧 Email: {{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.config.YOUR_EMAIL}}
📱 Phone: {{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.config.BUSINESS_PHONE}}

We look forward to seeing you!

Best regards,
{{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.config.BUSINESS_NAME}}

This is an automated confirmation from {{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.config.BUSINESS_NAME}}

parameters.subject: =Reminder: Appointment Tomorrow - {{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.config.BUSINESS_NAME}}

=

⏰ Appointment Reminder

Hi {{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.booking.name}},

🔔 Your appointment is tomorrow!

This is a friendly reminder about your upcoming appointment.

📅 Date: {{$node['Parse Date & Time'].json.appointment.dateFormatted}}
🕐 Time: {{$node['Parse Date & Time'].json.appointment.timeFormatted}}
💼 Service: {{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.booking.service}}
⏱️ Duration: {{$node['Parse Date & Time'].json.appointment.duration}} minutes

Please arrive 5 minutes early.

If you need to cancel or reschedule, please contact us immediately:

📧 {{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.config.YOUR_EMAIL}}
📱 {{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.config.BUSINESS_PHONE}}

Best regards,
{{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.config.BUSINESS_NAME}}

❌ Slot Not Available

Hi {{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.booking.name}},

⚠️ Sorry, this time slot is already booked

The appointment slot you requested is no longer available.

Requested: {{$node['Parse Date & Time'].json.appointment.dateFormatted}} at {{$node['Parse Date & Time'].json.appointment.timeFormatted}}

What to do next:

  • Please submit a new booking request with a different time slot
  • Contact us directly to check available slots
  • We'll do our best to accommodate your schedule

Contact us:

📧 Email: {{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.config.YOUR_EMAIL}}
📱 Phone: {{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.config.BUSINESS_PHONE}}

We apologize for any inconvenience!

Best regards,
{{$node['Config & Parse Form Data'].json.config.BUSINESS_NAME}}
